ui.footerAbout: Hand-painted Tibetan Thangka paintings from Boudhanath, Kathmandu Valley, Nepal.
ui.postsIntro: Learn about Tibetan Buddhist art, meditation, and the sacred tradition of Thangka painting.
ui.airwallexHint: Secure checkout via Airwallex — cards, wallets, and more (Hosted Payment Page).
ui.wechatPayScanHint: Open WeChat, tap Scan, and point at the QR code to pay.
ui.paymentJumpWechatStep1: On the next screen you will see the WeChat Pay collection QR code. After scanning, complete the transfer in WeChat.
ui.paymentJumpAlipayStep1: The next screen shows Alipay instructions. If no QR code is set up yet, contact support for the Alipay collection details.
ui.paymentJumpExternalStep1: You will open a secure payment page hosted by a third party. This site does not store your card or wallet credentials.
ui.paymentJumpAirwallexStep1: On the next step you will start Airwallex checkout. Allow redirects or pop-ups if your browser blocks them.
ui.paymentAlipayPlaceholder: Alipay collection QR is not configured on this page yet. Please contact support for payment details.
ui.paymentSupportText: For payment issues, contact support via WeChat or email.
ui.collectionsIntro: Browse our complete collection of authentic hand-painted Tibetan Thangkas, featuring Buddhist deities, mandalas, and spiritual art from Kathmandu Valley, Nepal.
ui.featuredIntro: Our handpicked selection of exquisite Tibetan Thangka paintings, featuring the finest Buddhist art from Kathmandu Valley.
ui.accountPrompt: Please log in to view your account
ui.termsP1: By using this website, you agree to our terms regarding product availability, pricing, and payment processing.
ui.termsP2: Product images and descriptions are provided in good faith. Hand-painted works may have slight differences from sample photos.
ui.termsP3Prefix: If you have questions about these terms, please contact
ui.privacyP1: We collect basic information needed to process orders, improve the website experience, and provide customer support.
ui.privacyP2: Your personal information is used only for order fulfillment and service communication. We do not sell personal data.
ui.privacyP3Prefix: You can request data access or deletion by emailing
ui.refundP1: We accept refund requests for damaged or incorrect items. Please contact support within 7 days after delivery with your order number and photos.
ui.refundP2: Custom orders are generally non-refundable unless the item is defective. Shipping fees are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.
